TAMIL  NADU  GOVERNMENT  GAZETTE
108
[ Part VI—Sec.1
NOTIFICATIONS BY HEADS OF DEPARTMENTS, ETC.
GENERAL NOTIFICATIONS
Variation to the Approved Salai road extension Town Planning Scheme of Tiruchirappalli
Local Planning Area.
(Roc. No. 8330/2010/DP3)
No. VI(1)/105/2011.
In exercise of the powers conferred under sub-section 2 of Section 33 of Town and Country Planning Act 1971, (Act
No. 35 of 1972) the Director of Town and Country Planning, Chennai hereby confirms the following variation of
Industrial use into public use in T.S. Nos. 86/2, 86/3 and 86/4 of Block No. 21, Ward G (Old S.F. No. 4043/2) of
Ko. Abisekapuram Division of Tiruchirappalli Municipal Corporation in Approved Salai road extension Town Planning
Scheme of Tiruchirappalli Local Planning Area. The said notification was published in the Tamil Nadu Government
Gazette No. 29, Part VI—Section 1, Page No. 239-240, dated 28th July 2010.
Since no objections and suggestions have been received on this draft notification within the stipulated time the same
are hereby confirmed and ordered as below.
CONFIRMATION OF VARIATION
1. The Salai road extension Town Planning Scheme of Tiruchirappalli Local Planning Area sanctioned in
G.O. No. 2710, Health Department, dated 29th July 1950 is varied.
2. The Plan thus varied is numbered as Map No. 5 DDP(V)/DTCP No. 27/2010.
3. The Schedule IV, Form No. 7, against the expression under the heading locality S.F. No. 4043/2
(New T.S.Nos. 86/2, 86/3, 86/4) deleted from the industrial use (New T.S.Nos. 86/2, 86/3, 86/4 of Block 21, Ward-G)
and Public use shall be substituted with an extent of 529.96 square meter.
4. The variation is made enforceable from the date of publication of the confirmed variation notification to be issued
under Section 33(2) of the Act and published in the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette.
PANKAJ KUMAR BANSAL,
Director of Town and Country Planning.
JUDICIAL NOTIFICATIONS
Destruction of Old records-Ribe cases–Rule 128 of Criminal Rules of Practice.
(Roc.No. 299/2011/C.)
No. VI(1)/106/2011.
Notice is hereby given that all the old case records and all the documents files in the cases enumerated below will
unless previously claimed be Destroyed at the expiry of the month from the date of Publication of this Notification.
The parties who have field any documents in these cases should apply to the Sarishatadar of this court for the
return of documents, account books etc., within a month from the date of publication of this notification in the
Tamil Nadu Government Gazette, failing which the documents will be destroyed along with the case records.
1. Year 1990 and
Entire records of Warrant Cases disposed of in the year 1990.
E.O.C.C. No. 1990
2. Year 2005
Entire records in all summons cases and City Municipal Act, Motor Vehicles Act and
Taxations Act and entire records in the cases disposed of under section 203, 204(4) Cr.P.C.
3. Year 2005
Entire records in all the Miscellaneous Proceedings disposed of in the year 2005.
4. Year 2005
Entire records in all petty Cases, preferred by police (viz. North Mobile and south Mobile
Petty cases and Corporation of Madras (viz. South Madras Summary Trial Cases, North
Madras Summary Cases) M.V. Petty cases.
5. Year 2000
Entire file in D.Dis.
6. Year 2007
Entire file in K. Dis.
7. Year 2005
Entire records in Juvenile cases, disposed of in the year 2005.
8. Year 2005
Entire records in E.O.C.C. Nos. of Summons cases disposed of in the year 2005.
9. Year 2010
Entire file in L.Dis.
Egmore, Chennai-8,
R. KILLIVALAVAN,
15th February 2011.
Chief Metropolitan Magistrate.


Mar. 9, 2011]

Destruction of Mcop Cases Records
(Dis. No. 184/11.)
No. VI(1)/107/2011.
The following MCOP case Records are going to be destroyed as per order passed by the Hon'ble Chief Judge, Court
of Small Causes, Chennai-104.
The Public Litigants and Counsels on Records are hereby informed to ascertain and to inform the facts regarding
the Pendency, Settlement of Award, if any pending in the cases mentioned herein within one month from the date of
this Notification.
